title: A Brave Rescue in Iran
summary: A US fighter jet was shot down in Iran, and two crew members had to jump out. One was rescued quickly, but the other was missing. The US military worked hard to find him in the mountains of Iran, where he was hiding from enemies. President Trump said it was a daring rescue mission. The airman was alone for over a day with a handgun, but US officials watched him all the time and planned the rescue. Helicopters and other planes helped in the operation. Finally, the airman was saved and is now safe. This shows how the military trains for tough missions to bring people home.

keywords.explanation: aircraft that can hover and fly low

questions.question: What happened to the US fighter jet?
How many crew members were on the jet?
Where was the missing airman hiding?
Who said the rescue was daring?
What did the airman have with him while hiding?
How long was the airman alone before rescue?

background_read: This article is about a rescue mission in Iran. Iran is a country in the Middle East, and sometimes it has conflicts with the US. The US military has special teams that train to save people in dangerous places, like when planes crash. This story shows how brave soldiers work together to help others, even in tough situations far from home.
Article_Structure: WHO: US military and President Trump
WHAT: Rescued a missing airman from a downed jet in Iran
WHERE: In the mountains of southern Iran
WHY: To save the airman who was hiding from enemies and bring him home safely

perspectives.description: The rescue was a brave and successful mission to save a soldier.
